description: Load the EEG recording from ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt in playback mode. Configure a 4.0 - 8.0 Hz bandpass filter for Channel 1 and an 8.0 - 13.0 Hz bandpass filter for Channel 2. Capture a screenshot showing the active filter configurations and save it to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/custom_filters.png.
